# Golden Fixtures

Pre-recorded `*_analysis.json` outputs from the standard pipeline,
committed so that deterministic schema/structure tests can verify
no regressions without requiring model weights at test time.

**Crucially, these fixtures are true pre-Phase-1 baselines**, generated by
the old codebase before any StrategyRouter changes were introduced.

## Contents

| File | Chart Type | Elements | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pie_7elem_golden.json` | pie | 7 | `src/images/bars/visualize/chart_00000_analysis.json` |
| `scatter_27elem_golden.json` | scatter | 27 | `src/train/analysis_output/chart_00003_analysis.json` |

> **Note on Element Counts**: The "elements" count in these JSONs refers to *detection-level* 
> elements (e.g., 27 individual scatter points), NOT protocol-level extraction rows.
> Schema-only regression tests validate that the pipeline doesn't drop these detections.

## How to regenerate

When model weights are available and the pipeline changes:

```bash
# Run pipeline on the source images
PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pipelines.chart_pipeline \
  --image <source_image> --output tests/fixtures/golden/

# Rename to match fixture convention
mv tests/fixtures/golden/<name>_analysis.json tests/fixtures/golden/<type>_<N>elem_golden.json
```

Then re-run `pytest tests/evaluation_tests/test_golden_regression.py -v`
to verify the fixtures pass.
